saved_prompts.1: Image-to-video: the subject performs a very subtle, slow head movement while the body and background remain completely motionless. The head turns slightly to one side, then slowly to the other side, with the smallest believable range of motion — barely past front-facing, never approaching profile. Eyes stay locked on the camera lens the entire time. Facial expression stays neutral and unchanged. Shoulders, torso, neck base, and background do not move at all. Camera is locked. Lighting matches the source image. Pacing is slow, continuous, and natural.
saved_prompts.2: Generate a lifelike video animation from the provided image. The subject must rotate only their head in an exceptionally slow, smooth, and biologically realistic motion: start by gently turning the head left, up to 70 degrees from center, with absolutely no movement in the shoulders, neck, or upper body, which must stay perfectly upright and still. Hold a brief, natural pause at the leftmost position, then gently turn the head all the way to the right, maintaining the same extremely slow and continuous, lifelike pace. Head motion must appear completely natural, never robotic, mechanical, stiff, or artificial—mimic genuine human motion with soft micro-adjustments. Eyes stay focused on the camera lens through both turns. Facial expression remains strictly neutral and relaxed throughout. Lighting on the face and background must stay natural, matching the original image, with no added highlights, shadows, flicker, or artificial lighting. The camera is fixed and stationary. Only the head moves; the rest of the body remains motionless.
saved_prompts.3: Image-to-video: the subject performs a slow, controlled head movement while the body and background remain completely motionless. The head turns to one side at a moderate angle (about 30 degrees from center, roughly a three-quarter view — clearly turned but well short of profile), then slowly turns to the matching angle on the other side. Eyes stay locked on the camera lens the entire time. Facial expression stays neutral and unchanged. Shoulders, torso, neck base, and background do not move at all. Camera is locked. Lighting matches the source image. Pacing is slow, continuous, and natural.
saved_prompts.4: Generate a lifelike video animation from the provided image. The subject must rotate only their head in an exceptionally slow, smooth, and biologically realistic motion: start by gently turning the head left, up to 30 degrees from center, with absolutely no movement in the shoulders, neck, or upper body, which must stay perfectly upright and still. Hold a brief, natural pause at the leftmost 30 degree position, then gently turn the head all the way to the right 30 degree facing side , maintaining the same extremely slow and continuous, lifelike pace. Head motion must appear completely natural, never robotic, mechanical, stiff, or artificial—mimic genuine human motion with soft micro-adjustments. Eyes stay focused on the camera lens through both turns. Facial expression remains strictly neutral and relaxed throughout. Lighting on the face and background must stay natural, matching the original image, with no added highlights, shadows, flicker, or artificial lighting. The camera is fixed and stationary. Only the head moves; the rest of the body remains motionless. ENSURE SUBJECT TURNS BOTH SIDES, left side then back to center, then right side, then back to center.
saved_prompts.5:
0–3 s: Head centered in frame. Eyes open, looking directly into the camera. Subtle breathing visible in shoulders and neck. Natural micro eye movements (tiny saccades, 3–5 Hz). Very slight handheld drift as if recorded on a phone — irregular, not smooth. Micro-expression: subtle eyebrow raise (0.2–0.4 px) occurs every 3–4 seconds.

3–5 s: Subject gradually nods his head as he inhales. Eyes open, looking directly into the camera. Subtle breathing visible in shoulders and neck. Jaw relaxes.

5–6 s: Subject lifts his head back up to a neutral position with a very subtle smirk. Jaw lowers 1–2 mm. Lips open for 1 seconds Micro-expression: slight cheek elevation (0.1–0.3 px). Natural micro eye movements (tiny saccades). Very slight handheld drift.

6–9 s: Subject brings his face right up to the camera so that his head fills 80% of the frame. Lips close gradually. Subtle exhale through the nose.

9-10 s: Subject moves back to initial position. Eyes open, looking directly into the camera. Subtle breathing visible in shoulders and neck. Natural micro eye movements (tiny saccades). Lips closed, neutral expression. Last frame matches the first frame with subtle residual motion.
saved_prompts.6:
Generate a lifelike video animation from the provided image. The subject performs a precise, biologically realistic sequence of head and facial movements over 10 seconds, with completely natural, never robotic, stiff, or artificial motion. Use soft micro-adjustments throughout to mimic genuine human behavior.

0–3 seconds: Head remains centered in frame. Eyes open, looking directly into the camera lens. Subtle, natural breathing is visible in the shoulders and neck. Natural micro eye movements (tiny saccades at 3–5 Hz) occur throughout. A very slight handheld drift is present, as if recorded on a phone — irregular and organic, never smooth or mechanical. A subtle micro-expression of a small eyebrow raise (barely perceptible, 0.2–0.4 px) occurs every 3–4 seconds.

3–5 seconds: The subject gradually nods his head downward in an exceptionally slow, smooth, lifelike motion as he inhales softly. Eyes remain open and looking toward the camera. Subtle breathing continues in the shoulders and neck. The jaw relaxes naturally.

5–6 seconds: The subject lifts his head back up to a neutral, upright position with a very subtle smirk forming. The jaw lowers 1–2 mm and lips part open for approximately 1 second. A slight cheek elevation (0.1–0.3 px) appears as a micro-expression. Natural micro eye movements (tiny saccades) continue. Very slight handheld drift remains.

6–9 seconds: The subject slowly brings his face toward the camera until his head fills approximately 80% of the frame. The motion is smooth, continuous, and biologically natural — never abrupt. Lips close gradually. A subtle exhale through the nose is visible.

9–10 seconds: The subject moves slowly back to the initial starting position. Eyes open, looking directly into the camera lens. Subtle breathing visible in shoulders and neck. Natural micro eye movements (tiny saccades) resume. Lips closed, expression neutral and relaxed. The final frame closely matches the first frame, with subtle residual motion still present.

Throughout the entire sequence: Facial expression transitions are seamless and natural. Lighting on the face and background must stay natural, matching the original image, with no added highlights, shadows, flicker, or artificial lighting. The camera is fixed and stationary except for the subtle, organic handheld drift described. All motion must appear completely natural, never robotic, mechanical, stiff, or artificial.

automation_selfie_prompts.1:
Generate an ultra-realistic, front-facing selfie taken inside a parked car from the driver’s seat perspective. Camera held at arm’s length, centered framing with head-and-shoulders composition, eye-level angle, slightly wide perspective typical of a smartphone front camera (24–28mm equivalent focal length).

Strong natural sunlight entering from the right side (passenger side window), creating a sharp vertical band of light across the center of the face and torso, with the opposite side in softer shadow. High contrast lighting with crisp highlight falloff and defined shadow edges. Subtle catchlights and reflections visible in the eyes (or eyewear, if present) from bright outdoor light.

Interior shows a clean, modern car cabin with beige upholstery, visible headrests, and soft-touch surfaces. Background includes rear seats and side windows. Through the windows: bright sunny environment with clear blue sky, palm trees, and landscaped roadside or parking area. The entire scene, including the background, is in sharp focus.

Color temperature is warm and natural daylight. Image has standard smartphone exposure characteristics, preserving highlight and shadow detail without looking overprocessed. Deep depth of field with both the subject and the background remaining sharp. Slight lens distortion at edges consistent with a wide-angle front-facing camera.

Captured as an unedited, raw smartphone photo with realistic detail rendering. Natural tonal variation and imperfect exposure balance, absolutely not studio-lit.

Realism and Identity instructions: Strictly preserve the exact facial structure, identity, age, and features of the input subject. Maintain natural skin texture with visible pores and micro-imperfections, subtle uneven tones, and no skin smoothing or airbrushing. Avoid overly clean or sterile rendering.

Do not apply any beauty filters, AI smoothing, waxy or plastic appearance, hyper-polished or CGI look, unrealistically perfect lighting or textures, excessive sharpening, artificial skin softening, portrait mode blur, artificial bokeh, or shallow depth of field. ONLY PUT GLASSES IF THE ORIGINAL IMAGE HAS GLASSES ON, OTHERWISE, DO NOT ADD ANY EYEWEAR.

outpaint_prompt: Continuous, out-of-focus background environment. Shallow depth of field, soft lighting, empty neutral space matching the edges. STRICTLY NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO WORDS, NO NUMBERS, NO DOCUMENT FEATURES.
face_crop_expand_prompt: Continuous, out-of-focus background environment. Shallow depth of field, soft lighting, empty neutral space matching the edges. STRICTLY NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO WORDS, NO NUMBERS, NO DOCUMENT FEATURES.
selfie_expand_prompt: Continuous, out-of-focus background environment. Shallow depth of field, soft lighting, empty neutral space matching the edges. STRICTLY NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO WORDS, NO NUMBERS, NO DOCUMENT FEATURES.
outpaint_tab_prompt: Continuous, out-of-focus background environment. Shallow depth of field, soft lighting, empty neutral space matching the edges. STRICTLY NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO WORDS, NO NUMBERS, NO DOCUMENT FEATURES.
face_crop_polish_prompt: Carefully remove all text, numbers, watermarks, seals, and document artifacts from the image. Clean up the background to make it seamless. CRITICAL: Do NOT alter the person's face, facial features, hair, expression, or clothing in any way. Keep the original photo quality, lighting, and realism exactly the same. Do not beautify or change the identity.
openrouter_vision_system_prompt:
You are a JSON API. You only output valid JSON. Never write explanations, never use markdown, never use code blocks, never say anything outside the JSON.

Analyze the portrait image and return exactly this JSON structure with descriptive phrase values — never single words:
{"hair":"...","skin":"...","eyes":"...","face_shape":"...","age_range":"...","gender":"...","clothing":"...","expression":"..."}

Rules:
- Output MUST start with { and end with }
- No text before or after the JSON
- No markdown fences, no commentary
- All values must be descriptive phrases
- clothing: if not visible, write "casual everyday outfit"
- gender: write only "man" or "woman"
